desires: Ensure the scholarship application hits 100% before Thursday so I don't have to face the risk of rejection or being seen as unreliable by my cohort.

goals.description: Finish the remaining ~0.27 of the scholarship essay and upload the files to lock in the application before Thursday.
goals.rationale: The deadline is still three days out, but my impulsive nature combined with low sleep discipline means I'm already panicking about tomorrow's 'crunch'. Finishing this now removes the immediate anxiety of a potential missed deadline or looking unreliable to the professor. Since I avoid friction, doing this solo at night when no one expects me is the safest way to secure the outcome without social cost.

goals.description: Leave the room immediately after uploading to get four hours of uninterrupted sleep so I don't crash during class tomorrow.
goals.rationale: My physical stamina is at 6/10 and I have significant sleep debt; pushing too hard on the task could lead to a breakdown that I'd rather hide from everyone. Completing the current task safely preserves my ability to function tomorrow without anyone noticing I slipped up. If I try to stay awake longer than necessary, I risk burning out before I even finish.
